name: copilot-rtl
description: change the direction of copilot chat to right-to-left for Arabic

copilotRtl.fontFamily.description: Font family for RTL Arabic text in Copilot chat (e.g. vazirmatn, Tahoma, Arial)

copilotRtl.fontSize.description: Font size in pixels for RTL Arabic text in Copilot chat

copilotRtl.lineHeight.description: Line height (line spacing) for RTL Arabic text in Copilot chat (e.g. 1.5, 1.8, 2)

copilotRtl.ltrFontFamily.description: Font family for LTR English text in Copilot chat. Leave empty to use VS Code default.

copilotRtl.ltrFontSize.description: Font size in pixels for LTR English text in Copilot chat. Set to 0 to use VS Code default.

copilotRtl.ltrLineHeight.description: Line height for LTR English text in Copilot chat. Set to 0 to use VS Code default.

copilotRtl.autoInputDirection.description: Automatically switch the chat input box direction to RTL when Arabic text is detected, and back to LTR otherwise.
